mapper.select: SELECT * FROM intent_few_shot WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM intent_few_shot WHERE intent = #{intent} AND is_active = TRUE ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE intent_few_shot SET intent = #{intent}, question = #{question}, intent_json = #{intentJson}, skeleton = #{skeleton}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE id = #{id}
